narrative:
Springfield Twp G (precinct in Summit County) has 1,080 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a clear Republican lean of 7.4 percentage points.
